user.title: Set up Free Games
user.description: Add the LootScraper free games feed to Home Assistant. Select which stores to track - a sensor will be created for each selected platform.

data_description.platforms: Choose one or more platforms. You can change this later from the Configure button.

abort.already_configured: Free Games is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

init.title: Free Games Options
init.description: Select which platform sensors to enable. Each enabled platform creates a sensor showing the current free game count.

amazon_loot.name: Amazon In-Game Loot Active Free Games

steam_loot.name: Steam In-Game Loot Active Free Games

apple_game.name: Apple App Store Active Free Games
